title: cupheanthus paniensis
intro: Cupheanthus paniensis, also known as Pani's cuphe or Pan's cuphe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cupheanthus paniensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Cupheanthus paniensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in traditional herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
